methods.name: open
methods.desc:
Opens a channel with initial deposit and returns derived channelId.
Caller becomes payer.
signerType: 0=Ed25519 voucher signer, 1=Falcon txn-auth mode (no voucher signature verification)

methods.name: topUp
methods.desc: Adds funds to an existing channel.

methods.name: updateVoucher
methods.desc:
Stores latest cumulative voucher amount on-chain.
In Ed25519 mode, requires valid voucher signature.
In Falcon txn-auth mode, requires payer sender auth.

methods.name: settle
methods.desc: Payee settles voucher funds, with support for partial settlement.

methods.name: settleLatest
methods.desc: Helper for payee: settle all currently unclaimed voucher amount.

methods.name: close
methods.desc:
Payee closes channel after all voucher obligations are settled.
Refunds remainder to payer.

methods.name: requestClose
methods.desc: Payer requests channel closure, starting forced-close grace period.

methods.name: withdraw
methods.desc: Payer withdraws remaining funds after grace period expires.

methods.name: optInUsdc
methods.desc:
Opt app account into configured USDC ASA so it can receive deposits.
Should be called once by admin/creator.

methods.name: getSessionStaticData
methods.desc:
Returns latest session static data tuple:
[startRound, startTimestamp]

methods.name: getSessionDynamicData
methods.desc:
Returns latest session dynamic data tuple:
[totalDeposit, lastSettled, latestVoucherAmount]
availableBalance = totalDeposit - lastSettled
unclaimedVoucherBalance = latestVoucherAmount - lastSettled

methods.name: computeChannelId
methods.desc: Read-only helper for clients: deterministic channelId derivation.

methods.name: settleMessage
methods.desc: Read-only helper for clients: exact bytes signed for settle/updateVoucher.

methods.name: verifySettleSignature
methods.desc:
Read-only helper for clients: verifies settle authorization exactly as settle/updateVoucher do.
- Ed25519 mode: validates voucher signature.
- Falcon txn-auth mode: validates caller is channel participant (txn-level auth).

channels.desc: BoxMap for channel data, keyed by channelId bytes.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: OnCompletion must be NoOp && can only call when creating
Only creator can opt in USDC
invalid number of bytes for ObjectAACF8510
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<arc4.uint8>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
